sections.title: Starting off
Returning to Rantz without ogre arrows

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Erk! Da's a yukky chompy, I's wants a yummie chompy!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey you creature... Have you made me da stabbers? I wanna stick da chompy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er not exactly?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: You do stabbers quick quick! Or Rantz make stabbers for Rantz and then practice for chompy sticking on creature!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I make the 'stabbers' again?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Grrr creature... you's no good stabber maker! You's make da stabbie bit from da dog bones, and get da sticksies from da Achey tree... simple see? Oh and da flufsies from da flappers as well!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, so I need logs from the achey tree, bones from a canine... and feathers?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Is just what Rantz sayed! ~ The hulking ogre nods excitedly. ~

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll make the 'stabbers' for you.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Good creature, quickly, hurry bring da stabbers!

sections.title: Talking to Bugs without a chisel and knife
Talking to Bugs after buying his chisel and knife

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: I's sorry creature, I don't got no more scratchers! But I got lots of bright pretties! Hope you's get da stabbers for Dad soonly!

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Hey you Creature, Dad says you's is gonna get da stabbers!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right... I'm making some 'stabbers' for Rantz.

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Dat's great...Dad want's to hunt da chompy... Da chompy is our bestest yumms! Yous needies da scratchers for makin' dem huh? I's wants some bright pretties for em!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many 'bright pretties' do you want?

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Bugs wants lots of bright pretties, this many! ~ Bugs quickly opens and closes his hands in front ~ ~ of you to indicate a number of bright pretties. ~ ~ It looks like he wants 10 gold coins.~

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll give you 10 bright pretties.

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: You's not got da bright pretties... I wants da bright pretties..you not get no scratchers wid'out da bright pretties.

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Ok, dat's a good 'un, I got da bright pretties and you got da scratchers!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, sorry, I can't give you that many...

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Well, you not have da scratchers den!

sections.title: Talking to Fycie
Talking to Fycie after buying her feathers

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: I's sorry creature, I don't got no more flufsies! But I got lots of bright pretties! Hope you's get da stabbers for Dad soonly!

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: Hey you Creature, I know's what you is You's a 'uman!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right... and I'm making some 'stabbers' for Rantz.

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: Dat's great...Dad want's to hunt da chompy... Da chompy is our bestest yumms! You needsing flufsies for stabbers, Fycie have some but I is wanting some bright pretties for em!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many 'bright pretties' do you want?

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: Mee's wants lots of bright pretties, this many! ~ Fycie quickly opens and closes her hands in front ~ ~ of you to indicate a number of bright pretties. ~ ~ It looks like she wants 50 gold coins.~

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll give you 50 bright pretties.

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: You's not got da bright pretties... I wants da bright pretties..you not get no flufsies wid'out da bright pretties.

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: Ok, dat's a good 'un, I got da bright pretties and you got da flufsies!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, sorry, I can't give you that many...

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: Well, you not have da flufsies den!

sections.title: Using ogre arrows not made by the player on Rantz

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey you creature..you made da stabbers Dat's good creature!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey, deese stabbers no good... did you make dem you's self? You go make dem stabbers for me creature! Don't get old ones or from other creatures.

sections.title: Using less than 6 ogre arrows on Rantz

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey you creature..you made da stabbers Dat's good creature!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, yes actually, as you asked so nicely. Here you go! Here's your 'stabbers'.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dat's not enough, me's an good shot, but need some for practice. Bring more than fingers on hand…

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey you creature! Make me some stabbers! I wanna hunt da chompy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stabbers?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: For da stabbie chucker, I's wanna hunt da chompy! Da chompy is der bestest yummies for Rantz, Fycie and Bugs! Creature knows what Rantz wants... flyin' to stabbie da chompy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I understand. You want me to make some arrows for you?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Yeah, is what Rantz sayed, make da stabbers for da stabby chucker!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, I'll make you some 'stabbers'.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Good you creature, you need sticksies from achey tree and stabbies from dog bones.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, make you're own 'stabbers'!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: When I make 'stabbers', I pretend you chompy and practice on you!

sections.title: Returning to Rantz with six or more ogre arrows

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Erk! Da's a yukky chompy, I's wants a yummie chompy!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey you creature... Have you made me da stabbers? I wanna stick da chompy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, yes actually, as you asked so nicely. Here you go! Here's your 'stabbers'.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey, 'dee'se stabbers no good! Did you make dem you's self? YOU go make dem arrows for ME creature!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dat's not enough, me's an good shot, but need some for practice. Bring more than fingers on hand...

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Ahh, der creature has dem... goodly, goodly. Now us can stick der chompy bird...

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: But da chompy not coming without da fatsy toadies... Godda get der fatsy toadies to get da chompys. Den we put it over de're and sneaky, sneaky stick da chompy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do we make the chompys come?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Chompys love da fatsy toadies. Toadies get big on der swamp gas and der chompys are licking der lips for em as me is licking lips for da chompy. Da chompys don't like da smaller toadies from nearby swampy.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dey's fussie eaters just like Rantz. Fycie an' Bugs play with toadies and blower dey's all times making fatsy toadies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are 'fatsy toadies'?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Fatsy toadies are da chompy burds bestest yumms. But da toadies here are too small for da chompy. You've godda make da toadies big and round!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do we put the 'fatsy toadies'?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Over der!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Ok creature? You got dat? Over dere by der no tree's place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean 'sneaky..sneaky, stick the chompy?'

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Duh! You creature is a bit stoopid yes? Us needs to sneaky, sneaky and stick da chompy! Den we can eat da chompy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

sections.title: Using ogre arrows made by the player on Rantz
Using ogre arrows on Rantz after giving him some already

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Creature already given Rantz stabbers, Dey's worser at flying dan a dead dog.

sections.title: Returning to Rantz without a bloated toad

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey you creature, you still here?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Da chompy still not coming! We need da fatsy toady to get da chompy, do you got it? Do you got da fatsy toady? Then we can sneaky, sneaky stick da chompy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I haven't got the 'fatsy toady' yet!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dat's a pidy... but maybe Rantz can help da creature?

sections.title: Talking to Bugs

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Rantz said that you play with the 'fatsy toadies', what are they?

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Oh we sometimes use da blower on da toadies but Dad don't let us get in da locked box no more. He, he, it was good fun making da toadies fat on da swamp gas.

sections.title: Talking to Fycie

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Rantz said that you play with the 'fatsy toadies', what are they?

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: Oh we sometimes is using blower on da toadies but Dad don't let us get in da locksy bocksy no more. He, he, big chuklees when make da toadies fat on da swampy gas.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey you creature..you made da stabbers Dat's good creature!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, yes actually, as you asked so nicely. Here you go! Here's your 'stabbers'.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Ahh, der creature has dem... goodly, goodly. Now us can stick der chompy bird...

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: But da chompy not coming without da fatsy toadies... Godda get der fatsy toadies to get da chompys. Den we put it over de're and sneaky, sneaky stick da chompy.

sections.title: Getting the ogre bellows
Searching the unlocked chest
Searching the unlocked chest with a full inventory
Filling the bellows

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Humph!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess this is what an ogre would call a locked chest.

sections.title: Getting a bloated toad
Attempting to place the toad before Rantz tells you where

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Come here toady!

sections.title: Returning to Rantz with the bloated toad
Using the bloated toad on Rantz
Using another toad on Rantz

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey creature got da fatsy toady Is you's gonna stick da chompy?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dat's a good fatsy toady, now we's need to put it for da chompy to come.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where should I put the 'fatsy toadies'?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Over 'dere creature, put da toadies over der! ~ The ogre points to a clearing to the south. ~

sections.title: Talking to Rantz again

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where should I put the 'fatsy toadies'?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Over 'dere creature, put da toadies over der! ~ The ogre points to a clearing to the south. ~

sections.title: Attempting to place the bloated frog at any other chompy location
Talking to Bugs

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: You's better talk to Dad, he might have something for you to do.

sections.title: Talking to Fycie

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: You's better talk to Dad, him chasey sneaky chompy.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey you creature, you still here?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Da chompy still not coming! We need da fatsy toady to get da chompy, do you got it? Do you got da fatsy toady? Then we can sneaky, sneaky stick da chompy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have a 'fatsy toady' for you, here look!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dat's a good fatsy toady, now we's need to put it for da chompy to come.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where should I put the 'fatsy toadies'?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Over 'dere creature, put da toadies over der! ~ The ogre points to a clearing to the south. ~

sections.title: Placing the bloated toad
Standing next to the bloated toad when it explodes
Talking to Rantz after placing the toad

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There you go, I've placed the bait.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Goodz, me now waits for da chompy! It shouldn't be long now. Sneaky... sneaky...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I know... stick da chompy!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey, you's creature, is da fatsy toady still dere? Go get more fatsy toadies if dey all gone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? I have to get more bait if there's none there? Does this Chompy Bird even exist I wonder?

sections.title: Successfully attracting a chompy
When flying down

lines.speaker: Chompy bird
lines.text: Sqwirk!

sections.title: When backing away from the player

lines.speaker: Chompy bird
lines.text: Screech!

sections.title: When eating a bloated toad

lines.speaker: Chompy bird
lines.text: Sqwark!

lines.speaker: Bloated toad
lines.text: !!Croak!!

lines.speaker: Chompy bird
lines.text: Gobble!

sections.title: After The chompy eats the toad

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey, dere's da chompy, I's gonna shoot it.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Grrr...de'ese arrows are rubbish.

sections.title: Talking to Rantz after he failed
Using the ogre bow on Rantz

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Yeah, it's a goodly stabbie chucker, but you's is too weedy to use it like Rantz.

sections.title: Talking to Rantz before hunting the chompy

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey You! Got da chompy yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Well hurry up and get some, we is hungry!

sections.title: Reclaiming a lost bow

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Rantz, I've lost the 'stabbie chucker', do you have another one please?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Mee's has, but is not for freeness, dis one cost [500-549] of da gold coinses. Does you wants it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll buy the bow.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey you don't got da coins...come back when you have.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey You! Got da chompy yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Well hurry up and get some, we is hungry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks...

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey You! Got da chompy yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Well hurry up and get some, we is hungry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks...

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey You! Got da chompy yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Well hurry up and get some, we is hungry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there, you keep missing the chompy bird.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: I knows, I keeps missing... because your stabbers are worserer at flying than a dead dog.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, keep trying then... you might hit one through pure luck.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Grrrr... You lookin' like a chompy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Come on, let me have a go...

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: No, is Rantz stabby thrower... you too weedy...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm actually quite strong... please let me try.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Oh, ok...I lend you other stabby thrower... but creature don't better cry when it hurts itself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh suit yourself, you'll just have to go hungry.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Or I eat you instead!

sections.title: Plucking the chompy
Talking to Rantz with a raw chompy
Using a raw chompy on Rantz

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dat's a great chompy, you musta got a lucky shot wiv da stabbie chucker.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Okay's now you's needs to cook da chompy! Slurp! You's can cook it's over der! <col=0000ff>~ Rantz points to a nearby spit roast. ~

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: But's we's particular about our chompy yumms. Me's wants Onion. wiv mine! Fycie and Bugs want something wiv der's as well, go and ask 'em wat dey want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What! Now I've got the chompy bird, you expect me to cook it as well?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Yep, da spit's over der! Last time Rantz did yummies, got very bad, did bad things to food... and belly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: HUH!

sections.title: Talking to Rantz again before cooking the chompy

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Okay's now you's needs to cook da chompy! Slurp! You's can cook it's over der! ~ Rantz points to a nearby spit roast. ~

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: But's we's particular about our chompy yumms. Me's wants Potato wiv mine! Fycie and Bugs want something wiv der's as well, go and ask 'em wat dey want.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: But's we's particular about our chompy yumms. Me's wants Onion. wiv mine! Fycie and Bugs want something wiv der's as well, go and ask 'em wat dey want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What! Now I've got the chompy bird, you expect me to cook it as well?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Yep, da spit's over der! Last time Rantz did yummies, got very bad, did bad things to food... and belly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: HUH!

sections.title: Getting the ingredient order from Bugs

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Dad say's you's making da chompy for us! Slurp! Me's has to have equa leaves wiv mine! Chompy is our favourite yummms!

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Dad say's you's making da chompy for us! Slurp! Me's has to have cabbage wiv mine! Chompy is our favourite yummms!

sections.title: Getting the ingredient order from Fycie

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: Dad say's you's roastling da chompy for us! Slurp! Me's wants tomato wiv mine! Yummy, can't wait to eats it.

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: Dad say's you's roastling da chompy for us! Slurp! Me's wants doogle leaves wiv mine! Yummy, can't wait to eats it.

sections.title: Attempting to use the ingredients on the raw chompy
Attempting to cook the chompy without the requested ingredients
Attempting to cook a chompy on a fire

lines.text: Hey You! Got da chompy yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yep, here's your chompy Bird!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dat's a great chompy, you musta got a lucky shot wiv da stabbie chucker.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Okay's now you's needs to cook da chompy! Slurp! You's can cook it's over der! ~ Rantz points to a nearby spit roast. ~

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: But's we's particular about our chompy yumms. Me's wants Onion. wiv mine! Fycie and Bugs want something wiv der's as well, go and ask 'em wat dey want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What! Now I've got the chompy bird, you expect me to cook it as well?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Yep, da spit's over der! Last time Rantz did yummies, got very bad, did bad things to food...and belly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: HUH!

sections.title: Cooking the chompy
Talking to Bugs

lines.speaker: Bugs
lines.text: Have you talked to Dad, he might have something for you to do.

sections.title: Talking to Fycie

lines.speaker: Fycie
lines.text: Go talk to Dad, him chasey sneaky chompy.

sections.title: Handing the chompy to Rantz or trying to cook another raw chompy

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey creature, did you's get da cooked chompy yet? I smelled something cooking and it mades me 'ungry. Hand over da chompy if ya know what's good for ya.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, here you go, here's your cooked chompy bird.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey hey! We got da delicious chompy bird - yay! This looks really tasty as well!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Tank's very much for da chompy... Fycie an Bugs like very much da chompy yumms! ~ The family of ogres sit down together and enjoy your well cooked chompy bird. ~

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's my pleasure!
